because.text: Accepted; implementation gate CLOSED for the Python reference (blocked by Codex round 1 -> fixed in-adjudication -> verified by a different family). The pass re-ran every round-1 probe against the current oracle (all fixed as claimed), attacked the new code paths specifically (comparator type-safety guaranteed by the metadata pre-filter; quota-under-tie_order correct; ts=0 falsy edge passes _is_uint), audited the s4 six-step derivation line-by-line ('no divergence'), and confirmed vector regeneration is no-diff. P2 adopted per the review's exact proposal: actor metadata must contain at least one non-whitespace character (prose + oracle strip(); whitespace-only -> not live -> absent; suite unchanged 37/37). Book III anchors at v0.6.0 with the remaining release items: Go parity + differential harness (in flight), Book II s7, anchors/headers/adoption warrant/tag.

subject.note: Gemini Book III verification pass: READY TO ANCHOR - all round-1 fixes confirmed, s4 derivation matches code with no divergence; 1 P2 (whitespace actors) adopted
